'''jagongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugniberry|ugniberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugniberry|ugniberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jagongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jægengeth|jægengeth]] || [[word:jægengej|jægengej]] || [[word:jægengesh|jægengesh]] || [[word:jægenge|jægenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jagogongoth|jagogongoth]] || [[word:jagogongoj|jagogongoj]] || [[word:jagogongosh|jagogongosh]] || [[word:jagogongo|jagogongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jagongoth|jagongoth]] || [[word:jagongoj|jagongoj]] || [[word:jagongosh|jagongosh]] || [[word:jagongo|jagongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jagofngoth|jagofngoth]] || [[word:jagofngoj|jagofngoj]] || [[word:jagofngosh|jagofngosh]] || [[word:jagofngof|jagofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jagongotho|jagongotho]] || [[word:jagongojo|jagongojo]] || [[word:jagongosho|jagongosho]] || [[word:jagongoko|jagongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jagongoth|jagongoth]] || [[word:jagongoj|jagongoj]] || [[word:jagongosh|jagongosh]] || [[word:jagongo|jagongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jagongothol|jagongothol]] || [[word:jagongojol|jagongojol]] || [[word:jagongoshol|jagongoshol]] || [[word:jagongokol|jagongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jagongothotho|jagongothotho]] || [[word:jagongojojo|jagongojojo]] || [[word:jagongoshosho|jagongoshosho]] || [[word:jagongoko|jagongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jagongothon|jagongothon]] || [[word:jagongojon|jagongojon]] || [[word:jagongoshon|jagongoshon]] || [[word:jagongokon|jagongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jagongothoro|jagongothoro]] || [[word:jagongojoro|jagongojoro]] || [[word:jagongoshoro|jagongoshoro]] || [[word:jagongokoro|jagongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
